pageHeading.title: Tattoo Aftercare
pageHeading.subtitle: Your guide to perfect healing and lasting beauty
pageHeading.healingDuration: Healing time: 2-4 weeks on the surface, 3-6 months fully

day-0.title: Immediately After Tattoo
day-0.description: The first hours are crucial. Your tattoo is an open wound and must be treated accordingly.

day-1-3.title: Cleaning Phase
day-1-3.description: Now begins the important cleaning phase. Regular, gentle care is crucial for optimal healing.

instructions.removeWrap: Carefully remove wrap and rinse tattoo with lukewarm water
instructions.patDry: Pat dry with clean towel (do not rub)
instructions.applyOintment: Apply a thin layer of healing ointment
instructions.noMoreWrap: Do not use wrap anymore (skin needs air)

day-4-7.title: Active Healing Phase
day-4-7.description: Your tattoo starts to peel and may itch. This is completely normal and shows that healing is progressing.

instructions.applyLotion: Apply thin layer of healing ointment or lotion
instructions.tapInsteadScratch: If itchy: tap gently instead of scratching
instructions.avoidTightClothing: Avoid tight clothing over the tattoo

day-8-14.title: Stabilization Phase
day-8-14.description: The top layer of skin is almost healed. The tattoo still looks a bit dull, but the colors will return.

instructions.drinkWater: Drink lots of water for skin health

week-3-4.title: Final Healing
week-3-4.description: Your tattoo is superficially healed, but the deeper skin layers are still healing. Colors become more vibrant.

instructions.contactStudio: Contact studio if you have concerns

longterm.title: Long-term Care
longterm.description: Complete healing takes 3-6 months. Proper care keeps your tattoo vibrant and beautiful.

instructions.dailyLotion: Use body lotion or tattoo care cream daily

warnings.sunBiggestEnemy: Sun is the biggest enemy of tattoos
warnings.noUvColorsFade: Without UV protection, colors fade quickly
warnings.weightChanges: Extreme weight changes can distort the tattoo

tips.do-2: Apply thin layer of healing ointment (3-4x daily)
tips.do-4: Drink lots of water for skin health
tips.dont-2: DO NOT bathe, swim, or sauna (2 weeks)
tips.dont-3: DO NOT expose to direct sunlight
tips.dont-4: DO NOT use plastic wrap after day 1
tips.dont-6: DO NOT pick scabs or peeling skin
tips.dont-7: DO NOT drink alcohol first 24 hours
tips.dont-8: DO NOT let pets touch tattoo
tips.dont-10: DO NOT use perfume or fragranced products

bepanthen.name: Bepanthen healing ointment
bepanthen.description: The classic choice for tattoo healing. Promotes natural healing and keeps skin supple.

ph-neutral-soap.name: pH-neutral soap
ph-neutral-soap.description: Gentle, fragrance-free soap for daily cleaning. Sebamed or similar brands.

tattoo-balm.name: Special tattoo care balm
tattoo-balm.description: Premium tattoo balm with natural ingredients. Promotes healing and maintains color vibrancy.

sun-protection.name: Sun protection SPF 50+
sun-protection.description: High-SPF sun protection specifically for tattoos. Prevents fading and skin damage.

body-lotion.name: Fragrance-free body lotion
body-lotion.description: For long-term care after complete healing. Keeps skin hydrated and tattoo vibrant.

warningSigns.title: Warning Signs
warningSigns.description: Contact a doctor or our studio immediately if you notice these symptoms:

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.subtitle: Still have questions? Our team is here for you anytime. Contact us with any aftercare questions.
